name: Help Scout
description: A customer support platform providing shared inboxes, knowledge base, and customer management tools.

auth_methods.note: Help Scout Mailbox API authentication docs describe using OAuth 2.0 access tokens (including authorization_code and client_credentials grants). Help Scout also documents API Keys as a legacy authentication method for existing integrations (see https://developer.helpscout.com/mailbox-api/overview/api-keys/).

credential_access.note: Getting Started for the Mailbox API instructs developers to create an app in the Help Scout Developer Portal to obtain a Client ID and Client Secret, indicating self-serve credential creation via the portal.

api_surface.note: The official Mailbox API documentation presents a RESTful API with broad coverage (e.g., conversations, customers, mailboxes, users, reports, webhooks) under the Mailbox API docs.

buildability.note: Official REST API documentation is publicly available and the Getting Started guide indicates developers can create an app in the Help Scout Developer Portal to obtain OAuth client credentials, so an integration can be built today.

queries: How to register Help Scout app Developer Dashboard
